That 2.1m swell and onshore wind sounds like a good day to watch the seagulls get barrelled.
🌊 Swell: 2.1m @ 16s 💨 Wind: 31.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 50.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.8m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy • Long period - powerful waves • Significant wind chop

programme.title: 🌊 2.9m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.7m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
With that much offshore on a 2.7m swell, it'll either be epic or a closeout sandblasting, maybe both.
🌊 Swell: 2.7m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 32.0km/h N (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 54.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.5m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves
